title: Keep attribute not working as expected

features.name: keep attribute fails to prevent wire aliasing in opt_clean
features.description: Code should include wires with (* keep *) attribute used to prevent optimization of an inverter chain, where the keep attribute fails to prevent opt_clean from aliasing even wires to a single driver

features.name: generate for loop creating inverter delay chain
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that instantiates a chain of NOT gates forming a delay line, which gets optimized away despite keep attributes

features.name: blackbox module instantiation as keep attribute workaround
features.description: Code should include a blackbox module definition and instantiation used as a workaround when (* keep *) attribute fails to preserve netlist structure through synthesis
